series_metadata.series_title: Status Report Files for Custodial Funds
series_metadata.series_description: Microsoft Excel spreadsheets that are created each week for each custodial fund for which the Treasurer serves as custodian and which are used solely for internal tracking purposes by the Trust department. These spreadsheets track the status of weekly reviews and identify details of relevant findings. The spreadsheets may include, but are not limited to: failed trades, issues of incident, claims, and the analysis of the confirmed reconciliation of assets (SEC-106). Status documents are created daily or weekly which are used solely for internal tracking purposes by the Trust Dept. The documents track the status of the daily and weekly control points that comprise the custodial compliance.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Electronic: data conclusion of current fiscal year, and an additional 4 fiscal years
